curve.png.description: A birds-eye view of a road, which is straight and then curves to the left. Numbers are marked along the center of the road, showing the degree of curvature at regular intervals. When the road is straight, the angle is 0°. As it shifts more and more sharply, the angle increases.

navlab.png.description: ALVINN / the Navlab, a retrofitted self-driving army ambulance

offset.png.description: A birds-eye view of a straight road with three cars on it, each marked with a number showing how far to the right of the center it is. The car on the center of the road is marked with a zero, the car to the right is +0.5, and the car to the left is -0.5

road2.png.description: curved concrete road surrounded with trees

skew.png.description: A birds-eye view of a straight road with three cars on it, each marked with a number showing how many degrees skewed the car is from the road. The car going straight is skewed by 0°, the car pointing to the right is +45, and the car facing perpendicular to the left is -90°

speed.png.description: A birds-eye view of a straight road with two cars on it, each marked with a number showing how fast it is traveling. The faster one is marked with 2.9, and the slower one 1.25

steering-v-curve.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Curve, showing a positive linear relationship
steering-v-curve.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

steering-v-curve-on-offset-scale.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Curve, showing a positive linear relationship
steering-v-curve-on-offset-scale.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

steering-v-curve-lr.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Curve, showing a positive linear relationship. The line of best fit is graphed on top of the scatter plot.
steering-v-curve-lr.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

steering-v-offset.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Offset, showing a negative relationship.
steering-v-offset.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

steering-v-skew.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Skew, showing a negative relationship.
steering-v-skew.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

steering-v-speed.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Offset, showing no relationship.
steering-v-speed.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

self-driving-car.jpg.description: A photo of a self-driving car with a sensor perched on top, parked in the middle of an empty road.
